game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Neon White is a single-player speedrunning FPS where you can sacrifice your guns for godlike parkour moves. Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though…

Features:

• You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption.



• Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities.



• Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts.



• Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?
game_info.description: You are Neon White, an assassin racing through a neon-lit heaven to exterminate demons. Collect Soul Cards to shoot enemies or sacrifice them for powerful parkour abilities like dashing and double-jumping. Complete the level by eliminating all demons as fast as possible. Master the card system to discover shortcuts and achieve the best time!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, aim up/down
Space: Jump (double jump available)
Z: Shoot current card / Use card ability (discard)
Shift: Dash forward (when holding dash card)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and shooting mechanics. Verify that the player can move, jump, and shoot enemies using the Soul Cards system.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through the level using arrow keys, collect cards, and shoot enemies with Z key. Test jumping mechanics and basic navigation.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, collects cards, shoots enemies, and demonstrates basic control responsiveness. No crashes or stuck states occur.

TEST_1.strategy: Move through the level using arrow keys, collect cards, and shoot enemies with Z key. Test jumping mechanics and basic navigation.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves, collects cards, shoots enemies, and demonstrates basic control responsiveness. No crashes or stuck states occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Test optimal speedrun strategy to win the game. Use card abilities strategically to eliminate all demons quickly and reach the goal.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Collect cards efficiently, use dash and double-jump abilities to navigate quickly, eliminate demons in optimal order, and reach the exit portal as fast as possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All demons are eliminated, player reaches the exit portal, GAME_OVER_WIN state is achieved with a competitive completion time.

TEST_2.expected: All demons are eliminated, player reaches the exit portal, GAME_OVER_WIN state is achieved with a competitive completion time.

TEST_3.test_description: Test parkour movement abilities including dash and double-jump mechanics. Verify card sacrifice system works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Collect cards and test discarding them for movement abilities. Use dash to cross gaps and double-jump to reach high platforms.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Card abilities activate correctly, movement is fluid, player can access all areas of the level using parkour moves.
